name: Basic Village
description: Foundation template for any village. Builds military infrastructure ready for troop training.

stages.name: Stage 1 - Main Building to 20
stages.notes: Warehouse (slot 20) and Granary (slot 21) upgraded on demand by greedy algorithm as costs require.

stages.name: Stage 2 - Rally Point and Barracks
stages.notes: Military foundation. Rally Point must exist before troops can move.

stages.name: Stage 3 - Academy
stages.notes: Academy to 10 unlocks most unit researches for mid-game.

stages.name: Stage 4 - Town Hall
stages.notes: Town Hall level 1 enables Small Celebrations for culture points.

stages.name: Stage 5 - Blacksmith
stages.notes: Blacksmith (in-game name confirmed) enables weapon and armor upgrades for troops.

stages.name: Stage 6 - Stable
stages.notes: Stable unlocks cavalry units. Level 10 needed for higher tier cavalry.

roman.notes: No tribe-specific buildings in basic template for Romans.

teuton.notes: Brewery is capital-only and requires Granary 20 + Rally Point 10. Managed manually via a dedicated capital template in the future.

gaul.notes: Trapper added early for passive defense while architect is away.

stage_additions.name: Stage 2b - Trapper (Gaul only)
stage_additions.notes: Trapper catches enemy troops passively. Level 5 gives meaningful trap capacity.
